{#- Notebook download button (overrides Sphinx default sourcelink). - HTML5 `download` attribute forces the browser to download the file instead of opening it inline as text/plain. - Sphinx already exposes the source under `_sources/.ipynb` (the `.txt` suffix is dropped by `html_sourcelink_suffix = ""`). -#} {%- if show_source and has_source and sourcename %}
⬇ {{ _('Download notebook') }}
{%- endif %}
